domain_name: Mobile phones and market efficiency in developing economies

background_concepts.concept: Mobile money / digital financial services (agent networks, USSD, digital wallets)
background_concepts.why_needed: The paper analyzes microentrepreneurs adopting mobile payment systems but assumes familiarity with how mobile money works (agents, wallets, feature-phone access via USSD) rather than teaching it.

suggested_resources.title: MFS 001 - A Beginner's Guide to Mobile Financial Services

domain_name: Rural electrification via microgrids and minigrids

background_concepts.concept: Levelized Cost of Electricity (LCOE) / net present cost in mini-grid feasibility
background_concepts.why_needed: The feasibility-assessment reading evaluates business models and system sizing using LCOE and net-present-cost metrics without explaining these financial concepts.

suggested_resources.title: Levelized Cost of Energy Calculation (arXiv intro sections)
Mini Grids for Half a Billion People — Handbook (ESMAP/World Bank)

background_concepts.why_needed: The microgrid demand paper applies Shove et al.'s three-element social practice framework as its analytic lens but presumes the reader already knows the theory.

suggested_resources.title: Social Practice Theory (University of Bristol workshop notes)

domain_name: Electricity provision and the political economy of the grid

background_concepts.concept: Energy access tiers / universal electrification frameworks (SDG7)
background_concepts.why_needed: These readings frame universal energy access in terms of policy targets and access tiers without introducing the underlying institutional framing.

suggested_resources.title: Technical and Economic Assessment of Off-grid, Mini-grid and Grid Electrification Technologies (ESMAP)

domain_name: Satellite/remote-sensing mapping of infrastructure and socioeconomic conditions

background_concepts.concept: Nighttime lights (DMSP-OLS / VIIRS) as a proxy for economic activity
background_concepts.why_needed: The reading tracks socioeconomic development from satellite imagery, relying on the established use of nighttime radiance and remote-sensing pixel data as development proxies without explaining these fundamentals.

suggested_resources.title: Applications of nighttime light data in international development research (3ie)

domain_name: Solar energy forecasting and rooftop/asset assessment

background_concepts.concept: Photovoltaic effect, solar irradiance, and soiling losses
background_concepts.why_needed: The soiling-experiment paper measures how dust reduces panel power output, assuming knowledge of the photovoltaic effect, irradiance (W/m²), and Standard Test Conditions.

domain_name: Sensing and data-driven optimization of local energy demand and services

background_concepts.why_needed: These readings analyze community energy usage and repurposed batteries for storage, assuming the reader understands storage sizing, load profiles, and cost per kWh over a system lifetime.

suggested_resources.title: Levelized Cost of Energy Calculation for Energy Storage Systems (arXiv intro)

domain_name: Disaster and climate risk detection for infrastructure resilience

background_concepts.concept: Disaster risk reduction frameworks (Sendai Framework, hazard/exposure/vulnerability)
background_concepts.why_needed: The systems-architecture-for-DRR paper presumes familiarity with the institutional vocabulary of disaster risk reduction — priorities, the hazard–vulnerability–exposure decomposition, and early-warning targets.

suggested_resources.title: What is the Sendai Framework for Disaster Risk Reduction? (UNDRR)
6 facts on the Sendai Framework (United Nations University)

domain_name: Rural telecenters and shared-access digital service delivery

background_concepts.why_needed: KioskNet is built on store-and-forward, delay-tolerant networking to serve intermittently-connected rural kiosks, assuming the reader understands DTN and the bundle/mechanical-backhaul model.

suggested_resources.title: Delay- and Disruption-Tolerant Networks: A Tutorial (NASA)

domain_name: Power grid reliability monitoring and analytics

background_concepts.why_needed: The Uganda grid-outage paper uses NLP topic modeling on outage records to surface recurring issues but assumes the reader knows how techniques like LDA extract latent topics from text.

suggested_resources.title: Introduction to Topic Modelling in NLP (DigitalOcean)

domain_name: Rural and last-mile network connectivity measurement

background_concepts.concept: Cellular signal metrics (RSSI, Ec/Io, RSCP, throughput) for 2G/3G
background_concepts.why_needed: These measurement studies report signal strength and quality using metrics like RSSI and Ec/Io and cellular-generation terminology without defining them.

suggested_resources.title: Beyond Signal Bars: Understanding RSSI, RSRP, SINR & Other Key Metrics (Teltonika)

domain_name: Digital inclusion for marginalized users and small organizations
